name: onslaught-career-editor-workspace
description: WinUI-first workspace for the Onslaught Toolkit.

scripts.test: npm run test:product && npm run test:rebuild-core
scripts.test:safety: py -3 tools\public_allowlist_safety_check.py --self-test && py -3 tools\public_allowlist_safety_check.py --include-submodules && py -3 tools\legacy_patch_script_safety_test.py
scripts.test:tools: py -3 tools\aya_archive_inventory_tests.py && py -3 tools\export_game_assets_tests.py && py -3 tools\prepare_game_profile_test.py && py -3 tools\runtime_process_identity_test.py && py -3 tools\runtime_proof_lab_hygiene_test.py && py -3 tools\send_game_window_input_test.py && py -3 tools\start_cdb_server_test.py && py -3 tools\start_game_profile_test.py
scripts.release:winui-zip: py -3 tools\winui_lore_pack_builder.py --self-test && py -3 tools\winui_zip_package_probe_test.py && py -3 tools\winui_zip_package_probe.py --check --include-media-smoke
scripts.test:rebuild: npm run test:rebuild-core && npm run test:rebuild-client && py -3 .\rebuild\tools\cmsh_static_preview_tests.py && pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File .\rebuild\tools\GodotToolchain.Tests.ps1 && pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File .\rebuild\tools\FirstFlightSmokeValidation.Tests.ps1 && pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File .\rebuild\tools\FirstFlightSmokeRunner.Tests.ps1 && pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File .\rebuild\tools\LocalAssetWorkspace.Tests.ps1
